ast.name: text
ast.source: update steam_playtime_forever and steam_playtime_2weeks for any notes with steam_id on plugin load
ast.target: 插件加载时为包含 steam_id 的任何笔记更新 steam_playtime_forever 和 steam_playtime_2weeks

ast.name: text
ast.source: This will work by checking metadata in the current files for either an `id/Id`, `slug/Slug`, or `name/Name` fields to query the API. As a very last fallback it will try using the filename as a query but any files that can not be requeried in all in any of these manners will be skipped for regeneration and *not* deleted
ast.target: 它将通过检查当前文件中的元数据来工作，使用 `id/Id`、`slug/Slug` 或 `name/Name` 字段来查询 API。作为最后的兜底，它会尝试使用文件名进行查询，但凡是无法通过这些方式重新查询的文件将跳过重新生成且*不会*被删除
